title: Psilocarya schiedeana
taxonomy: Psilocarya schiedeana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Psilocarya. The species is native to Mexico and Central America. Further classification is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, and clade - Asterids. It is closely related to other species within the same family and genus.
